name: Uberall CoreX
highlight_text: Best suited for: Multi-location brands, B2B businesses, Service-based companies, Resellers
description:
What Uberall Does

Uberall CoreX is a reputation management platform designed for multi-location businesses and agencies serving those clients. It provides an array of tools for generating reviews, responding to feedback, analyzing sentiment, and monitoring online presence. It’s a great platform with partnerships with industry-leading brands.

‍

Source: G2

Key Features

  • Review request campaigns via email, SMS, and custom QR codes to proactively invite customer feedback
  • AI-powered review response assistant to suggest reply content across platforms
  • Unified inbox to read, respond to, and manage reviews from a single dashboard
  • Integration with industry-specific review sites like automotive, financial services, etc.
  • Natural language processing for in-depth sentiment analysis of written reviews
  • Mobile app for local teams to monitor reputation and get custom alerts
  • Customizable review approval workflows to control response process
  • Head-to-head reputation benchmarking against competitors

Pricing

Offers custom prices for all services

Pros

✅Offers excellent marketing ad templates that allow managers to create branded campaign

✅Segments campaigns based on the audience of each social network and branch

✅Users appreciate the intuitive interface that simplifies marketing strategies

Cons

❌Support is a pain point for many customers using the platform

❌Some users find the Android and iOS apps to be quite limited compared to the web version, affecting functionality and user experience

❌The platform's numerous options may overwhelm new users, there’s a need for simplification and additional training resources

❌Lesser integrations with other platforms
what_people_say:
‍

What customers say

“Tools like automatic review response are great for giving a sense of closeness to potential customers. It's also easy to incorporate some small improvements to our pges, such as CTA buttons and shortcuts to the nearest store location.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com

‍

“Integrations are still a bit deficient. It's not possible to be responsive on all the platforms I use automatically, but perhaps that's a specific requirement of my organization.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com
